cn.description: Common Name for this host's identity certificate.

ca_url.description: URL of the step-ca API used to enroll and renew this agent's identity certificate.

ca_fingerprint.description: SHA256 fingerprint of the step-ca root CA.

cert.description: Path where the agent writes and reads its identity certificate (PEM).

key.description: Path where the agent writes and reads its identity private key (PEM).

bootstrap_token.description: Path to the bootstrap token file. Only required during initial enrollment.

renew_before.description: Renew the identity certificate when less than this time remains before expiry.

warn_before.description: Write a warning to stderr when less than this time remains before expiry. Should be greater than renew_before.

server_ca.description: Path to the internal root CA certificate (PEM).

retries.description: Number of times to retry a failed broker request.

state_dir.description: Directory used as the base for agent state.

certificates.description: List of service certificates this agent manages.

profile.description: Name of the profile to request. Must be listed under this host in policy.yaml.

key.description: Path where the agent writes the service private key (PEM).

cert.description: Path where the agent writes the service certificate (PEM).

chain.description: Path where the agent writes the intermediate chain (PEM).

fullchain.description: Path where the agent writes the full chain certificate and intermediates (PEM).

reload_command.description: Shell command executed after the certificate is installed or renewed.

renew_before.description: Request a new certificate when less than this time remains before expiry.
